feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC - Chart mixing 2 measures
entry.content:
Hey, 
I have a workforce model.
in my account dimension I have:

1. Labor GL accounts - and I use them with measures as local value, USD, EUR.

2. Statistic accounts - for FTE planning (actual FTE, new hire, termination, expected FTE) which I use with measure FTE (Not Financial)

I want to create a chart showing my expected FTEs, as a line, and my expected salary expenses as columns.
but as it's in 2 measures I'm not able to create the line, or by changing the order of  date&measure I can create a line that is not overlapping the columns - see below

Is there any way to do it?
Thanks

entry.title: How to avoid quick books job failed after scheduling?
entry.content: the source is Quick books and target is MS SQL and job development is completed. job is moved production and it's scheduled every day and one week cycle execution is successfully run after first day of week it's getting failed. So could you please give suggestion on this.it will help full to everyone.

entry.title: Widget in the view mode in SAP Analytics Cloud do not update automatically
entry.content:
Hi together

we have a SAC story, where the dynamic filter for the widget is filled via an authorization concept. In the create/work mode the values for the widgets are updating correctly, however in the view mode the widgets do not update according to the filter. They only update when you click on the 3 dots. We noticed this issue just now, not sure if its related to the new quartelery release. Can you please suggest a solution. we would like to roll out the dashboard soon

entry.title: SAC Dropdown button activating few data actions
entry.content:
Hey, 
I need some help with simple scripting in SAC analytics.
I've created a dropdown button with 3 options, and for each of them I have a different data action that I want to activate (having the prompt window popping up)
1. do I have to place those data action triggers in the story? if yes how can I hide them?

2. what is the script I should write down to have it done?

thank you
Deb

entry.title: How to setup 2 Factor Authentication for SAC Systems
entry.content:
How to enabled two factor authentication (2FA) for SAC since there are very sensitive information which the Analytics systems holds and hence need to know how to enable MFA on this system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Question on setup and usage of Dimension tables in SAC
entry.content:
Situation is as followed:
We have an ODATA connection which looks simplified like this:

Fact table:  Activity (KYF, Activity, Customer_id)
MD Table:  Customer (Customer ID, Name, Adress, …)

There are 3 other of such dimensions to handle, all same same.
Per table there is one ODATA source, which is at the moment not customizable.
The ID is cryptic and not SAP Style. A dimension linkage is all planned stories is out of the question.

As I understood from all the docs I scanned, the usage of dimension tables in SAC works as followed

  • I make a model based on the MD Table and create from there a Dim Table based on Customer_id with all the other fields as properties. With the load of that main model the dim table gets loaded indirectly.
  • I create the model on the fact table, exchange the customer_id field with the created Dim_table, map the sourcefield to the table.

Problem:

To make a MD model and with that the DimTable I obviously need to have a measure, which I do not have in source.
I tried to solve that with creating a dummy KYF and a data transformation “null = 1”, but this does not work.
There must be a mapping from the source to KYF and I do not have a field that is compatible with dec or int in the source I could load and later overwrite.

To have a transactional data set to derive MD used in other transactional data does not make sense at all since never all MD are used or the other. The whle thing looks not thought out thoroughly.

So how do can I bypass this?

Thanks for help!
Dirk

entry.title: Sales Cloud V2 Connection to Analytics Cloud and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

How can Sales Cloud V2 be connected to Datasphere and Analytics Cloud?

The "classic" Sales Cloud provides standard OData APIs like "/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/" or "/sap/c4c/odata/analytics/ds/Codopph.svc" to extract all the needed Master Data and Business Objects such as Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, and Quotes.

How can V2 be connected to Datasphere and Analytics Cloud?

Best regards,
Joelle

entry.title: Business content for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi, I found that SAP Analytic Cloud support various business content. After a few times I checked through all the content, I found that the supported contents are mainly for S/4HANA and SAP Datasphere (Data connectivity). But my business is using SAP Business One (SAP HANA), so the questions are:


1. Can the business content designed for S/4HANA connections and SAP Datasphere also be used with SAP Business One (HANA)? For example, if a content use an S/4HANA connection to extract data from a model, can that connection be easily reconfigured to connect to a similar model in SAP Business One (HANA)?


2. Is there specific content for Business One (HANA)? Are there any resources like online content, guides, or communities focused on Business One (HANA) content in SAP Analytic Cloud?

entry.title: Export to PDF using scripts in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Team,

When I'm writing simple script to export to PDF using a button on click event, the report is not getting exported and it is stuck with screen message as below:

 I wrote the below script on a button after enabling "Export to PDF" option in Outline.

entry.title: Create a pareto chart on any model within the SAC
entry.content:
Currently, SAC does not have a pareto chart option by default. However, with some calculated measures and dimensions it's possible to create one.

There are 5 total measure calculations we need, and 2 dimension calculations.

In this example our KPI of interest is QTY_Shipped and our dimension of interest is SKU, replace these with your own.

Calculations in order of use

1. Sum KPI: for this you need to do a SUM aggregation on the KPI you are interested in across the dimension you will split the chart by. E.g:

2. Restricted Sum KPI: now, create a restricted measure based on Sum KPI across the version dimension filtered to actual (as this will encompass all data, if this is a planning model then this wont work and you'll have to ask me to work it out 🙂 ), and with constant selection enabled across all dimensions. This, and step 1 are so we can get a grand total of the KPI of interest but across each of the members of the dimension of interest so we can get a % of the total:

3.Negative KPI: For our Dimension calculations, we first need to convert our KPI of interest to be negative, this is so later on the dimensions calculations are sorted correctly. We do this with a simple calculation: 

 

 

4.Negative Number Dimension: This is converting our negative KPI to a dimension. We are doing this so in a further calculation of a running total, we can calculate it across our numerical values so it sorts properly. For a pareto chart we sort from High to Low for our KPI, however, running total will calculate the total based on A-Z (or Low to High) hence why we need it to be negative. This calculation needs to be done over the dimension of interest and Version (which is auto added) and using the Negative KPI calculation. Make sure to check “Use measure values as dimension members”:

 

5. Numerical Dimension to Sort: This calculated dimension is used to convert our previous calculated dimension to a number. Whilst it looks like its a number, it actually is a string and is sorted as such. E.g 1,10,2,3,33,4 rather than 1,2,3,4,10,33. This Calculated dimension makes sure a dimension that has numerical values is treated as such:

 

 

6.Running Total: Now we use the “Running Total” calculation to create a Running total SUM of our KPI of interest over our dimension of interest (SKU) and our “Numerical Dimension to Sort”. Both dimensions are needed otherwise the running total will not calculate properly. As previously explained, this running total will calculate over the dimension selected, sorted by their IDs from A-Z. It does not respect the chart sort, this is why we have to create calculations 3,4, and 5 to get a dimension with IDs that when sorted would be the same sort as High-Low sorting of our KPI of interest over our dimension of interest.

 

7.Pareto %: This is our final calculation. It takes our running total and divides it by the Restricted Sum KPI to get that data points % of the grand total. After the calculation, we also need to edit its format to get it to display as a %. To do this, just untick “Use unit of underlying measure” and the change scale to “Percentage”:

 

 

 

 

Now, in your chart select combination column and line, and add the KPI of interest to the column axis, and the Pareto % to the line axis. Add you dimension of interest to the dimensions, and also add the “Numerical dimension to sort by”. Unfortunately, this is the only downside (apart from the number of calculations) as the calculations need this dimension to be in the chart.

 

 

Currently this only works on an unfiltered dataset. It might be possible to work on a filtered set so I will update the post with instructions when I can.

entry.title: Unable to set Dinamic Text [#Date]-1 on Broadcasting Description or Body
entry.content:
Hi,

when we send a report it presents information relating previous day -> Date-1.

We are trying to send in boardcast. On story content we have a filter and a dinamic text and its fine. But on boardcasting email we are not able to put on description of the email or even on the body of the email [#Date]-1, we have only a tiny list of Dimanic texts available there. Any way to do on boardcating description and body previous day?

best regards

entry.title: Date format in Exporting Table to XLSX in SAC, from BW live data model
entry.content:
hi all,

we faced an issue with date format in Exporting Table to XLSX from SAC (from BW live data model).

we have dates in format dd.mm.yyyy (31.05.2024) and in excel it can't be chaged to Date format.

I tried changing the date formatting in Profile Settings as recommended in a similar question on this site (Date format in Exporting Table to XLSX in SAC)

But it didn't help, is it because of the Live Data Model? How can we change this?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC - Using dynamic time calculations in Exception Aggregation is not supported.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am getting this error, "Using dynamic time calculations in Exception Aggregation is not supported". What I want is "Mix" Total and remove its formula dependency on the last total row calculation.

"Mix" is calculating from this formula, Below is the Screenshot of the formula.

I have used Restricted Measure for "PY_Price" and "PY Parent Price".

In the screenshot below, the calculation is logically correct: the "Vol Mix Diff" in the Totals row is zero, and ("PY_Price" - "PY Parent Price") is also zero, resulting in a "Mix" value of zero. However, I want the Grand Total of "Mix" to be derived from the sum of the above rows. Additionally, I need to calculate the "Mix Contribution" in another column, which would be computed as "Mix" divided by GrandTotal("Mix"). Unfortunately, "Add Calculation" -> "Aggregation" does not support this operation. Model is analytic.

Is there any way I can achieve that ?

entry.title: Export jobs to ACDOCP from profitability & Opex are duplicating the values inFP&A
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using FP&A content and customized according to the customer needs. After planning we are exporting the plan data to ACDOCP from FI_IFP_IM_Profitability and FI_IFP_IM_OPEX models. When we load the OPEX load, we have observed that the measure values are getting offsetted and becomes zero. Opex load is causing this issue. Is there anything we are missing related to WBS Element and cost center.

Thanks

Sridhar

entry.title: Displaying Only Total Figures for Cost Elements in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a story in SAP Analytics Cloud where I have 1 to 9 series of cost elements. I want to show only the total figures for each series without displaying the details of each cost element. I do not want to use a chart; I just need to display the total numbers.

Can anyone guide me on how to do this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Null values handling using LINK function in data actions in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing the issue with Null values while writing the logic in data actions. Here is the scenario. I have two Models. Model A, has units and sales as account. Model B, has additional sales and commission % as account. The data is written in Model B by reading the values from Model A and writing an additional calculation.

 Calculation:

IF Units = 0 or NULL then

Total Sales(model B) = Sales(model A) * Commission % (model B)

Else

Total Sales(model B) = Sales(model A) + Additional Sales(model B)

Please refer below screenshot.

I'm writing the same logic but no result is generated  for Sept and Oct as they have null values. This is what I'm writing this code in data action. I'm using the correct syntax for LINK,DATA and RESULTLOOKUP statement in the below code and this pseudo code is for reference.

IF LINK(Units(model A) > 0 then

DATA(Total Sales(model B)) = RESULTLOOKUP(Sales(model A)) + RESULTLOOKUP(Additional Sales(model B))

Else

DATA(Total Sales(model B)) = RESULTLOOKUP(Sales(model A) ) * RESULTLOOKUP(Commission % (model B))

 

Anyone who has faced this similar kind of issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Getting Error in R Script
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am getting the below error while executing the R script in R Visualization. PFB of R script.

entry.title: Performance issues with standard GLAccountBalanceFlow CDS when loading SAC
entry.content:
Hi folks.

When using GLAccountBalanceFlow (OData service UI_FINS_GLAccountFlow) to load transactional data from S/4 into SAP Analytics Cloud, we are noticing that the performance is significantly worse than all other transactional CDS views we are using.

We are applying all recommended filters you would expect, such as Chart of Account, Controlling Area, Movement Type, Fiscal Period etc. and despite a relatively low data volume (<100k) the performance is still unacceptably bad. Attempting to run will hang for several hours and then raise short dumps due to memory outage.

If this is the CDS view that is intended as the SAP standard solution for loading closing Balances, something is going wrong. Are there any recommended steps or prerequisites to get this to work better? It is only this one CDS that seems to be having such issues.

Kind Regards

entry.title: SAC Forecast chart feature seems missing
entry.content:
Hello community.

I have a question about finding the forecast add-in in a time series chart. With the previous version of SAC stories I could locate it in the "3 dot" menu of the chart, in the "Add" section.

But in the new optimized version I wasn't able to find it anywhere. Did anyone from the community fased a similar issue? How can I solve it? 

Thank you in advance 

 

#SAP #SAC#Forecast

entry.title: Waterfall Chart: Color Subtotals like Increase / Decrease
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

in Waterfall Chart in SAC we want to color a subtotal bar according to its value. We can switch between 3 and 4 colors in waterfall color layout. If we select three colors, subtotal is colored like a total. When we change to 4 colors, we can define a certain color for subtotals. But we want the subtotal bar to change its color according to the value.

In the following screenshot the second bar should be formatted like the following bars. (green or red according to its value)

 

Is this possible somehow? Am I missing something here. Datasource is BW4HANA live connection. Subtotal is a hierarchy node in BW.

An alternative could be, to not show the subtotal bar at all, but only the child nodes. But I have not found a way to do this either, so far.

Any help is much appreciated. Thanks.

Dominik
